asset_family: Mine Cards production equipment item source sheet
audience: Mine Cards idle mining RPG equipment items; blocky fantasy mining, readable at inventory and gameplay icon size

fail_summary: old equipment sheet uses a white/near-white matte that conflicts with metal highlights
baked shadows and soft background haze are not production-safe for runtime compositing
several gutters and borders are too tight for reliable alpha trim and padding
shadowfix is acceptable for fake shots and concept boards, not final runtime packing
screen_problem_to_solve.runtime_goal: Produce a clean, cuttable equipment/item sprite source family for later inventory/equipment UI and mining upgrades, without adding equipment mechanics to the current T0001 screen.

required_asset_groups.role: isolated equipment and trinket sprites with explicit pivots
required_asset_groups.size_class: source 224-320px per item, preview at 64px and 96px
required_asset_groups.anchor_policy: record center pivot for inventory icons; tool sprites also record grip/attachment anchor before runtime use
required_asset_groups.component_isolation_policy: one item per slot, no fused shadows, no neighboring fragments in expanded crop

required_asset_groups.role: compatibility group for generated-asset validators; actual current source family exports the same equipment items as sprites/icons, not separate UI icons
out-of-scope placeholder group for validator compatibility; equipment source v001 must not generate UI slot frames
required_asset_groups.content_policy: Do not include in the isolated equipment sprite sheet.
required_asset_groups.stretch_zone_policy: Future equipment UI frames need a separate UI-kit source family.
required_asset_groups.decor_overlay_policy: No decor overlays are generated in this equipment sprite source family.

final_asset_policy.notes: Source art may be generated or artist-authored, but runtime sprites must be cut from the accepted source sheet. The old white-background sheet and shadowfix output are reference-only. UI slot frames/panels are intentionally excluded from this source-family prompt and should be generated in a separate UI-kit job.

source_family_roles.blank UI kit sheet: future equipment UI slots/frames only; not generated by this T0008 source-family prompt
source_family_roles.isolated icon sheet: future condensed equipment/status icons only; current equipment source sheet exports standalone item sprites
source_family_roles.isolated equipment sprite sheet: cuttable standalone equipment/item sprites: tools, helmet, armor, rings, charm, and relic scroll; no UI frames or text

background.notes: Use exact flat #00ff00 if transparency is not supported. Do not use blue, white, gray, gradients, vignette, paper, floor, or checkerboard.

rows.purpose: worn stone/iron pickaxe, copper pickaxe, mining helmet, and miner chest armor
plain dark metal ring, ruby ring, skull relic scroll, and mine charm amulet
hand axe, battle axe, spiked mace, and dark crown for later RPG equipment mood

source_sheet_layout.cut_policy: Each slot must contain exactly one complete object. Leave empty blue background around silhouettes and soft edges. Shadows, glows, rarity badges, labels, and UI plates are separate future layers, not baked into this source sheet.

prompt_constraints: Mine Cards blocky fantasy mining RPG item art
use the old equipment sheet only as silhouette/material reference, not as a copied source
chunky readable silhouettes with hammered metal, worn leather, ore/copper accents, and low-poly/block-inspired facets
consistent 3/4 inventory icon perspective and warm mine lighting baked into the item surface only
exact flat #00ff00 background or true transparent PNG
no cast shadows, no floor shadow, no glow halo on the background
at least 64px outer margin and 48px gutters between all visible pixels
no UI frames or card borders
no unique decoration inside slice9 stretch zones

runtime_composition.inventory_or_equipment_ui: runtime UI composes item sprites over generated/runtime item slots; item art does not include slots, stat labels, or rarity text
runtime_composition.tool_attachment_future: pickaxe sprites may inform future 3D/attachment art, but this raster source sheet is not a skeletal gear mesh

commands.new_generation_record: node tools/assets/new_generation_record.mjs --id <source-id> --project-dir gamedesign/projects/mine-cards --source-family "isolated equipment sprite sheet" --source-family-role "production equipment item sprites" --accepted-source <path> --provider <provider> --model <model-or-workflow> --workflow-path <workflow.json> --prompt-packet gamedesign/projects/mine-cards/art/prompts/mine-cards-equipment-source-v001-prompt.json --seed <seed> --prompt "<prompt>" --negative-prompt "<negative prompt>"
commands.native_evidence: defer until equipment UI or upgrade screen integration starts
